mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_user WHERE deleted = FALSE AND created_at < #{end}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cs.user_id) FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_session cs ON cm.session_id = cs.id JOIN t_user tu ON cs.user_id = tu.id WHERE cm.created_at >= #{start} AND cm.created_at < #{end} AND cm.role = 'user' AND tu.deleted = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_message WHERE created_at < #{end} AND role IN ('user', 'assistant')

SELECT COUNT(1) AS "totalCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' ) AS "successCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'ERROR' ) AS "errorCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE duration_ms > 20000 ) AS "slowCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND knowledge_hit = FALSE ) AS "noKnowledgeCount", AVG(duration_ms) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' ) AS "avgLatencyMs" FROM t_chat_turn_metric WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end}
SELECT date_trunc(#{bucketUnit}, created_at) AS bucket, COUNT(1) AS value FROM chat_session WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end} GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT date_trunc(#{bucketUnit}, created_at) AS bucket, COUNT(1) AS value FROM chat_message WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end} AND role IN ('user', 'assistant') GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT date_trunc(#{bucketUnit}, cm.created_at) AS bucket, COUNT(DISTINCT cs.user_id) AS value FROM chat_message cm JOIN chat_session cs ON cm.session_id = cs.id JOIN t_user tu ON cs.user_id = tu.id WHERE cm.created_at >= #{start} AND cm.created_at < #{end} AND cm.role = 'user' AND tu.deleted = FALSE GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT date_trunc(#{bucketUnit}, created_at) AS bucket, AVG(duration_ms) AS "avgLatencyMs", percentile_cont(0.95) WITHIN GROUP ( ORDER BY duration_ms ) AS "p95LatencyMs" FROM t_chat_turn_metric WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end} AND status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket

SELECT date_trunc(#{bucketUnit}, created_at) AS bucket, COUNT(1) AS "totalCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' ) AS "successCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'ERROR' ) AS "errorCount", COUNT(1) FILTER ( WHERE status = 'SUCCESS' AND knowledge_hit = FALSE ) AS "noKnowledgeCount" FROM t_chat_turn_metric WHERE created_at >= #{start} AND created_at < #{end} GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
